description: Renovate covers the Bazel-module gap that Dependabot cannot: bzlmod deps in every MODULE.bazel (bazel-module manager) and the pinned Bazel release in every .bazelversion (bazelisk manager). GitHub Actions and the Python benchmark deps stay with Dependabot (.github/dependabot.yml) so the two bots cover disjoint ecosystems and never open duplicate PRs.
Requires the Mend Renovate GitHub App installed on the elide-dev org with access to rules_elide — this config file alone does nothing.

Not managed here: the Elide compiler version (DEFAULT_VERSION in elide/private/versions.bzl) and its per-platform sha256 table. Bumping it requires recomputing release hashes, so it stays a deliberate manual update.

packageRules.description: Group all bzlmod (MODULE.bazel) updates into a single PR.
The Bazel release itself (.bazelversion across all workspaces).
